LABEL: 
HCPCS Modifier Code 
DESCRIPTION: Modifiers 1–4 to the Healthcare Common Procedure Coding System (HCPCS) procedure code to 
enable a more specific procedure identification for the revenue center or line-item service for the 
encounter record.
